<!--
  If you have a relevant JIRA issue number, please put it in the issue title.
  Example: UIIN-817 Orders schema updates
-->

## Purpose
<!--
  Why is this change needed? Explain the underlying problem or need,
  not just what was changed (avoid "updates the schema" style
  statements). Write so a developer with no prior context can
  understand the reasoning.
 -->

## Approach
<!--
  How does this change achieve the purpose? Summarize the high-level
  strategy rather than walking through the commit history, so future
  developers can understand and build on your solution.
-->

## Refs
<!--
  If you have a relevant JIRA issue, add a link directly to the issue URL here.
  Example: https://issues.folio.org/browse/UIIN-817
-->

## Screenshots
<!-- OPTIONAL
  Add before/after screenshots or a GIF to visually demonstrate the
  change, especially for UI/interaction updates.

  GIF tools: Windows - https://getsharex.com/ | Mac - https://gifox.io/
-->
